title: Black PVC Professional Insulating Tape Roll, 30 metres - Waterproof, Ideal for Electrical Repairs & Insulation
features: PROFESSIONAL GRADE INSULATION: Designed to handle a variety of electrical repairs, this professional insulating tape roll spans a generous 30 meters in length and features a width of 19mm, ensuring you have enough coverage for multiple uses.

ROBUST & WATERPROOF: Crafted from high-quality PVC material, this tape boasts a waterproof design, making it ideal for outdoor applications or settings where moisture is a concern, ensuring lasting protection against the elements.

SUPERIOR ADHESIVE QUALITY: Offering exceptional self-adhesive properties, this tape sticks reliably to a range of surfaces, providing a secure, tight bond that won’t easily peel away, even in challenging conditions.

VERSATILE & MULTIPURPOSE: Not just for electrical repairs, our professional insulating tape is useful for a range of applications, including sealing and bundling wires, marking and labeling, or even as a protective layer in arts and crafts projects.

ENHANCED THICKNESS FOR ENDURANCE: With a 0.16mm thickness, our insulating tape exceeds standard durability measures, offering added strength and resilience. It ensures a robust barrier for electrical insulation and repairs that withstand the test of time.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION:this premium quality roll of PVC professional insulating tape is 30 metres length with a width of 19mm, 0.16mm thickness for extra strength. Safety Warning No warning applicable
